rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
generic_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
